zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，上行趋势延续
zh.content:
从当前价格表现来看，SOL/USD报67.3美元，运行于20日均线66.13美元上方，显示多头仍占据主导地位。24小时涨幅虽仅0.09%，但价格持续维持在日内区间上沿附近，整体呈现震荡偏强格局，短期趋势保持温和上行。

技术指标方面，MACD主线数值为0.627，位于零轴上方，反映市场仍具备一定上涨动能。虽然缺少Signal线及RSI数据，无法确认动能强弱和超买超卖状态，但价格站稳均线且MACD保持正值，说明趋势结构仍偏向积极。

关键位置上，67.14美元构成短线第一支撑位，同时20日均线66.13美元形成较强动态支撑。若价格跌破66美元区域，可能引发进一步回调。上方阻力首先关注67.8美元日内高点，突破后有望测试68.5至69美元区间。

交易策略方面，激进投资者可关注67.8美元突破后的顺势做多机会，目标看向68.5美元上方；稳健交易者则可等待回踩66.5至66.1美元支撑区域再行布局。若价格有效跌破20日均线，应控制仓位并警惕短线调整风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is showing a mildly bullish tone, with the price trading at 67.3 and holding above the 20-period simple moving average at 66.13. The narrow daily range between 67.14 and 67.8 suggests a period of consolidation following recent upward momentum. As long as price remains above the SMA(20), buyers retain a modest advantage, indicating that the short-term trend remains constructive despite limited volatility over the past 24 hours.

Momentum indicators provide a cautiously positive outlook. The MACD value of 0.627 indicates bullish momentum remains present, although the absence of a signal-line reading limits confirmation of trend strength. RSI data is unavailable, making it difficult to assess whether the market is approaching overbought or oversold conditions. Even so, the positive MACD reading combined with price action above the moving average supports the view that bullish pressure continues to outweigh bearish pressure in the near term.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around 67.14, the session low, followed by stronger support near the SMA(20) at 66.13. A break below these levels could expose SOL to a deeper corrective move toward the mid-65 region. On the upside, resistance is evident near 67.8, the recent high. A decisive move above this barrier could encourage further buying interest and potentially open the path toward the 69.0–70.0 area.

Traders may consider maintaining a cautiously bullish bias while the market holds above 66.13. Conservative participants could wait for a confirmed breakout above 67.8 before entering long positions, seeking stronger trend confirmation. More aggressive traders may look for pullbacks toward support zones as potential entry opportunities, provided buying activity remains visible. Risk management remains essential, with stop-loss placement below key support levels helping to protect against unexpected reversals in market sentiment.
